issues.description: PowerBoost target must filter by type {Fish-Man} or {Merfolk}; current scope 'ChooseOwnCharacterOrLeader' lacks type constraint

Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and Rest action with maxCost:4 is unexplained in card text; card only describes one Rest action targeting opponent's Characters with cost ≤3. This effect should not exist.
Target should specify 'up to 1' via maxCount or similar; current definition lacks quantity constraint clarity
